surfaces.command: cargo run -p dslraid-cli -- query examples/runscope/runscope.raid.json 'kind=transition and requires~=policy:no_secret_leak or terminal=true' --format json
surfaces.meaning: Query finds policy-gated transitions without reading internal indexes.

surfaces.command: cargo run -p dslraid-cli -- query tests/golden/query/guard-action.input.json 'kind=guard and expression.source~=ready' --format json
surfaces.meaning: Query can inspect guard and action semantic fields.

surfaces.command: cargo run -p dslraid-cli -- compose examples/runscope/runscope.raid.json --materialize diagnostics-only --format json
surfaces.meaning: Diagnostics-only composition stays lazy and avoids state materialization.

surfaces.command: cargo run -p dslraid-cli -- compose examples/runscope/runscope.raid.json --materialize reachable --limit 5000 --focus state:runtime.running --depth 1 --format json
surfaces.meaning: Focused reachable composition materializes only the requested surface.

closure_rules.meaning: Every query surface is exercised by CLI output.
Composition surfaces must keep lazy metadata.
Consumers need query and compose commands, not internals.
